The '''''Lady''-class Luxury Liner''' was a 310-meter long passenger [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] design produced by [[Shobquix Yards]]. Ships of this design were considered part of the wider [[M-class|''M''-class]] subset of the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] classification.

==Characteristics==
Armed with four twin-[[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] turrets and equipped with a fairly standard Class 2 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], the ''Lady''-class Liner offered a number of activities to its passengers on relatively safe voyages. Most vessels conducted sightseeing and vacation tours, both on major [[Hyperspace route/Legends|routes]] and in distant territories.

Although traveling to remote locations, the liners never picked up or discharged passengers in these areas, due to regulations and lack of suitably large [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]]. Boarding or disembarking would only occur at the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] home port or at scheduled stops along the way.

==Known ships==
*''[[Lady of Mindor]]''
